request.description:

item.name: Register a new customer or seller account

request.description:
### Register a new customer or seller account

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `string` | Yes | User's full name. | Max Length: `255` |
| `email` | `string` | Yes | Unique email address. | Max Length: `255` |
| `password` | `string` | Yes | Password (must be confirmed). | - |
| `password_confirmation` | `string` | Yes | Password confirmation (must match password). | - |
| `role` | `string` | Yes | Role, must be 'customer' or 'seller'. | Enum: `customer`, `seller` |
| `shop_name` | `string / null` | No | Required if registering as a seller. Unique shop name. | Max Length: `255` |
| `shop_description` | `string / null` | No | Required if registering as a seller. Description of the shop. | Max Length: `1000` |

### Responses

#### Response: `201`


```json
{
    "message": "totam",
    "user": {
        "id": 91,
        "name": "repudiandae deleniti veniam",
        "email": null,
        "email_verified_at": "1974-12-07T18:10:49+00:00",
        "role": "expedita",
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2016-02-11T16:45:34+00:00",
        "updated_at": "2025-01-30T06:43:54+00:00"
    },
    "authorization": {
        "access_token": [],
        "token_type": "deserunt",
        "expires_in": "vero"
    }
}
```

#### Response: `422`
Validation error

```json
{
    "error_code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
    "message": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": []
}
```

body.raw:
{
    "name": "aspernatur occaecati necessitatibus",
    "email": "bradley.wisoky@example.com",
    "password": "x2(+$(q8X",
    "password_confirmation": "}!.KWFo\\8hl;LgT#",
    "role": "customer",
    "shop_name": "Temporibus repudiandae inventore consequatur fugiat quasi. Sed consequatur inventore unde est deserunt sed. Quas numquam est quo tempora temporibus atque dolorem.",
    "shop_description": "Odio cumque et dolor qui incidunt."
}

item.name: Authenticate a user and receive a token

request.description:
### Authenticate a user and receive a token

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `email` | `string` | Yes | Authenticating user's email address. | - |
| `password` | `string` | Yes | Authenticating user's password. | - |

### Responses

#### Response: `200`


```json
{
    "message": "vitae",
    "user": "porro",
    "authorization": {
        "access_token": true,
        "token_type": "eaque",
        "expires_in": "expedita"
    }
}
```

#### Response: `401`
Providing an incorrect password during login.

```json
{
    "error_code": "INVALID_CREDENTIALS",
    "exception_type": "InvalidCredentialsException",
    "message": "The email or password you entered is incorrect."
}
```

#### Response: `403`
Attempting to login or perform actions with a deactivated account.

```json
{
    "error_code": "ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED",
    "exception_type": "AccountDeactivatedException",
    "message": "Your account has been deactivated. Please contact support."
}
```

#### Response: `422`
Validation error

```json
{
    "error_code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
    "message": "The given data was invalid.",
    "errors": []
}
```

### Add a new address

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|

| `phone` | `string / null` | No | Contact phone number for delivery. | Max Length: `30` |
| `address_line1` | `string` | Yes | Primary street address details. | Max Length: `255` |
| `address_line2` | `string / null` | No | Secondary address details (e.g., suite, unit, building). | Max Length: `255` |
| `city` | `string` | Yes | City name. | Max Length: `100` |
| `province` | `string` | Yes | Province or state name. | Max Length: `100` |
| `postal_code` | `string` | Yes | ZIP or postal code. | Max Length: `20` |
| `country` | `string / null` | No | Country name. | Max Length: `100` |

### Responses

}

### Place order

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `address_id` | `integer` | Yes | Must be a valid address ID belonging to the authenticated user. | - |
| `payment_method` | `string` | Yes | Must be either 'wallet' or 'cod'. | Enum: `wallet`, `cod` |
| `wallet_id` | `integer / null` | No | Required if payment_method is wallet. Must be a valid wallet ID belonging to the authenticated user. | - |
| `items` | `array` | Yes | List of items in the order. | - |

Max: `9999999.99` | | `stock` | `integer` | Yes | Available stock quantity. | Min: `0` | | `is_active` | `boolean` | No | Activation status of the product. | - | | `tags` | `array / null` | No | List of tags (maximum 10 tags). | - | ### Responses #### Response: `201` ```json { "product": { "id": 19, "shop_id": 65, "name": "autem sapiente illo", "description": "Incidunt eum tenetur est sit.", "price": 299.94, "stock": 4, "tags": [ "debitis" ], "is_active": true, "deleted_at": "1996-06-19T06:53:34+00:00", "created_at": "2011-06-24T19:46:54+00:00", "updated_at": "1984-12-23T02:21:44+00:00" } } ``` #### Response: `401` Requesting protected routes without a valid JWT token, or token is expired/invalid. ```json { "error_code": "UNAUTHENTICATED", "exception_type": "AuthenticationException", "message": "You are not authenticated.
